title: Unanimous Vote for Secretary of State

segments.title: Opening the report
segments.audioText: Welcome to the Voice of America’s News Words.
segments.transcript: Welcome to the Voice of America’s News Words.
segments.translationZh: 歡迎收聽美國之音嘅《News Words》。

points.label: Welcome to
points.explanationZh: 開場常聽到 Welcome to，意思係『歡迎來到／收聽』，後面接節目名。

points.label: Voice of America
points.explanationZh: 專有名詞要整段聽；Voice of America 即 VOA，美國之音。

points.label: News Words
points.explanationZh: 節目名，重音通常落喺 News 同 Words，幫你確認片段主題。

segments.title: Rubio takes office
segments.audioText: Florida Senator Marco Rubio was recently sworn in as American Secretary of State.
segments.transcript: Florida Senator Marco Rubio was recently sworn in as American Secretary of State.
segments.translationZh: 佛羅里達州參議員 Marco Rubio 最近宣誓就任美國國務卿。

points.label: Florida Senator Marco Rubio
points.explanationZh: 先聽身份再聽人名：Florida Senator 係『佛羅里達州參議員』。

points.label: was recently sworn in
points.explanationZh: sworn in 係『宣誓就任』；recently 提示係最近發生。

points.label: as American Secretary of State
points.explanationZh: as 後面講新身份；Secretary of State 係美國國務卿。

segments.title: What the job means
segments.audioText: The secretary of state, or the country’s chief diplomat, was appointed by the president and approved by a unanimous vote in the Senate.
segments.transcript: The secretary of state, or the country’s chief diplomat, was appointed by the president and approved by a unanimous vote in the Senate.
segments.translationZh: 國務卿，即係國家嘅首席外交官，由總統任命，並獲參議院一致投票批准。

points.label: or the country’s chief diplomat
points.explanationZh: or 呢度係補充解釋：國務卿即係國家首席外交官。

points.label: was appointed by the president
points.explanationZh: 被動式 was appointed by 表示『由總統任命』。

points.label: approved by a unanimous vote
points.explanationZh: approved by 係『由……批准』；unanimous vote 指一致投票。

segments.title: Foreign policy focus
segments.audioText: Secretary Rubio said the president’s foreign policy is centered on the advancement of the country’s national interest.
segments.transcript: Secretary Rubio said the president’s foreign policy is centered on the advancement of the country’s national interest.
segments.translationZh: Rubio 國務卿表示，總統嘅外交政策以推進國家利益為中心。

points.label: foreign policy
points.explanationZh: foreign policy 係『外交政策』，係國際新聞常見組合。

points.label: is centered on
points.explanationZh: is centered on 表示『以……為中心』，on 後面接核心重點。

points.label: national interest
points.explanationZh: national interest 係『國家利益』，通常作為政策目標。

segments.title: Meaning of unanimous
segments.translationZh: Unanimous 意思係完全同意、一致同意。

points.label: Unanimous means
points.explanationZh: means 後面會直接解釋字義，聽到就準備記意思。

points.label: in complete agreement
points.explanationZh: complete agreement 指『完全一致』，complete 加強 agreement。

points.label: agreement
points.explanationZh: agreement 係『同意；共識』，可以用喺會議、投票同討論。

sentences: Welcome to the Voice of America’s News Words.
Florida Senator Marco Rubio was recently sworn in as American Secretary of State.
The secretary of state, or the country’s chief diplomat, was appointed by the president and approved by a unanimous vote in the Senate.
Secretary Rubio said the president’s foreign policy is centered on the advancement of the country’s national interest.

vocabulary.example: The senator spoke before the vote.
A diplomat represents a country overseas.
vocabulary.translationZh: 外交官代表國家處理海外事務。

vocabulary.example: The president can appoint senior officials.
vocabulary.translationZh: 總統可以任命高級官員。
呢個決定係一致通過嘅。

vocabulary.example: Foreign policy deals with other countries.
vocabulary.translationZh: 外交政策處理同其他國家有關嘅事。

vocabulary.example: Leaders often talk about national interest.
vocabulary.translationZh: 領袖經常談到國家利益。

phrases.example: Marco Rubio was sworn in as Secretary of State.
The secretary of state is the country’s chief diplomat.
The appointment was approved by a unanimous vote.
The policy is centered on national interest.
The group was in complete agreement.

speakingPractice.prompt: 由 00:05 開始跟讀第二句，留意 was recently sworn in as 嘅連讀。
speakingPractice.example: Florida Senator Marco Rubio was recently sworn in as American Secretary of State.

speakingPractice.prompt: 重播 00:16，先寫低你聽到嘅 appointed by 同 approved by 兩個被動片語。
speakingPractice.example: was appointed by the president and approved by a unanimous vote

speakingPractice.prompt: 用 is centered on 改句，換入一個你熟悉嘅主題。
speakingPractice.example: This lesson is centered on listening practice.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用兩句英文複述：Rubio 做咩職位？unanimous 係咩意思？
speakingPractice.example: Marco Rubio was sworn in as Secretary of State. Unanimous means everyone agrees.

notes: 先用時間點重播每句，盲聽一次，再開字幕核對。
第三句較長，可以拆成三段：job explanation / appointed by / approved by。
跟讀時重點放喺 sworn in as、appointed by、approved by，呢啲係新聞常見被動片語。
最後一句係定義句，適合做聽寫：Unanimous means in complete agreement.
